trait.name: Masterful Step
trait.effect: If you don't attack during your turn, gain haste and during your next turn, all abilities gain effect [+].

basicAttack.name: Wind's Kiss
basicAttack.effect:
Effect 1
Attack: 2 damage. Hit: +1d6
On hit haste.
Effect 1.

limitBreak.name: Dance of the Scarlet Lily
limitBreak.effect:
You pick the perfect, serene moment to unleash woe upon your enemy.
Effect your turn. Target ally can immediately use any non-limit break ability that costs 1 action or less, (4+) also gaining evasion and haste (6+) and clearing all negative statuses first.
Effect effect [+] if your ally is in crisis.

keywords.name: Weave
keywords.description: When you use a weave effect, you gain the effect immediately, and then may repeat a copy of it as part of the very next ability you use. If multiple weave effects trigger, you can choose the order. Copies of a weave effect cannot weave further.
